best_balanced_config.name: UNDER_gap5_hr60-70_line15
best_balanced_config.description: Best balance of win rate + volume across full dataset

filters.note: l10_hit_rate is DIRECTION-SPECIFIC: for UNDER picks, 60-70% means player goes under 60-70% of L10 games

best_volume_config.name: UNDER_gap4_hr60-70_line15
best_volume_config.description: Relaxed gap for higher volume, still hits targets

key_insights.winning_formula: UNDER direction + large gap (projection far below line) + L10 HR in 60-69% sweet spot + line >= 15
why_it_works: L10_hit_rate [60,70) for UNDER = player goes under the line 60-70% of L10 games — established trend
Gap >= 5 means model projects significantly BELOW the line — strong statistical edge
Line >= 15 filters out fringe players with tiny lines where variance dominates
UNDER has systematic edge: sportsbooks set lines closer to mean, but median < mean for most stats
what_doesnt_work: L10_HR >= 70 for UNDER picks — actually worse! (probably means line is already adjusted)
L10_HR >= 80/90 — near random, HR doesn't predict future outcomes well
OVER direction at any gap level — consistently underperforms UNDER
High gap alone without HR filter — gap 5+ still only 51% without HR filter
Tier filtering alone — tiers are barely predictive in this data
key_insights.temporal_warning: Feb-Mar 2026 data shows degradation (23% HR) due to fringe player noise. Line >= 15 filter fixes this.

mathematical_reality_check.verdict: 80% TARGET ACHIEVED on both 2-leg and 3-leg parlays across multiple configs
